abort.entry_not_loaded: Failed to add AI task. The configuration is disabled.

data_description.context_length: Maximum number of tokens the model can process in a single request. Higher values use more RAM.
data_description.flash_attention: Enable flash attention for faster inference on compatible GPUs.
data_description.idle_timeout: Minutes to keep model loaded after last use before unloading. Set 0 to keep loaded indefinitely.
data_description.max_history: Maximum number of previous conversation exchanges to keep in context.
data_description.streaming: Stream tokens back to the user in real-time as they are generated.

abort.entry_not_loaded: Failed to add agent. The configuration is disabled.

data_description.context_length: Maximum number of tokens the model can process in a single request. Higher values use more RAM but allow processing more context.
data_description.flash_attention: Enable flash attention for faster inference on compatible GPUs.
data_description.idle_timeout: Minutes to keep model loaded after last use before unloading. Set 0 to keep loaded indefinitely.
data_description.llm_hass_api: Choose which Home Assistant APIs the model can access to control devices and query state.
data_description.max_history: Maximum number of previous conversation exchanges to keep in context.
data_description.prompt: Custom instructions for how the LLM should behave and respond. Leave empty for default.
data_description.streaming: Stream tokens back to the user in real-time as they are generated.
